title: Minecraft-Fitting Font Project / MFFP
description: Custom fonts tailored to fit the game's aesthetic perfectly
body:
# Minecraft Font Enhancement Resource Pack

## Overview
Enhance the aesthetics of Minecraft fonts with this Resource Pack, designed to bring a touch of authenticity and nostalgia to your Minecraft experience. Dive into the world of blocky adventures with fonts that seamlessly blend with the game's iconic style.

## Features

- Better font!
- Blockier shapes for the font!


## Reasons to download
1. To make your non-Lunar Client minecraft look more like Lunar Client!
2. Make the fonts more square-like!

## Installation Guide
### Requirements
- Minecraft Java Edition installed on your computer ig
- Access to the .minecraft and .minecraft > resourcepacks folder

### Steps
1. **Download the Resource Pack**: Click the green Download button on the version you desire.
2. **Locate the Minecraft Resource Pack Folder**: Follow the step-by-step instructions provided in our installation guide.
3. **Move the Resource Pack Files**: Copy, move (or cut idc) the downloaded ZIP file and paste it into the resource pack folder.
4. **Enable the Resource Pack in Minecraft**: Launch Minecraft, navigate to Options, and select Resource Packs. Move the pack to the "Selected" list and click Done.

### Experience the New Look
Enjoy your new font!

# FAQ
![cat boom boom](https://cdn.discordapp.com/emojis/1232772859387056169.gif?size=48&quality=lossless&name=catboom)

**_Q_**: Is this available for bedrock?

**_A_**: Unfortunately, no. However, i encourage bedrock players to make their own bedrock version! :D


***Q***: Will this affect my performance?

**_A_**: Yes, but neglible. This is only a texture pack, so it wont affect your performance drastically.


**_Q_**: What is MFFP?

**_A_**: It is a texture pack designed to fit the font with minecraft's aestethic.


**_Q_**: How can i download it?

**_A_**: The steps are in the description.


**_Q_**: Where can i get MFFP?

**_A_**: You can get it in [Modrinth > Minecraft Fitting Font Project > Versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-fitting-font/versions).


**_Q_**: Can i customize the fonts?

**_A_**: You can modify the resource pack files to edit the fonts.
